mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT img_no, img_name, img_uid, img_kind1, img_kind2, img_kind3, s_conf, sort_idx, is_display FROM com_img WHERE img_no = #{imgNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(img_no), 0) + 1 FROM com_img
INSERT INTO com_img ( img_no, img_name, img_uid, img, img_kind1, img_kind2, s_conf ) VALUES ( #{imgNo}, #{imgName}, #{imgUid}, #{img}, 'MAP', #{imgKind2}, 1 )
mapper.sql: ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, B.user_dev_name, B.dev_name, B.dev_ip, CASE WHEN A.src_type IN ('DEV','SVR','ESM') THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_dev_hist T1 WHERE TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN CONCAT(T1.from_yyyymmdd, T1.from_hhmmss) AND CONCAT(T1.to_yyyymmdd, T1.to_hhmmss) AND is_evt = 0 AND mng_no = A.src_mng_no) = 0 THEN A.evt_level ELSE -2 END WHEN A.src_type = 'IF' THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_if_hist T1 WHERE TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN CONCAT(T1.from_yyyymmdd, T1.from_hhmmss) AND CONCAT(T1.to_yyyymmdd, T1.to_hhmmss) AND is_evt = 0 AND mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND if_idx = A.src_idx) = 0 THEN A.evt_level ELSE -2 END ELSE CASE WHEN A.progress_state = '조치중' THEN -1 ELSE A.evt_level END END AS evt_level_tmp FROM cm_evt A, (SELECT mng_no, user_dev_name, dev_name, dev_ip, grp_no FROM cm_dev10 WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_leaf WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo} ) )) B WHERE A.src_mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.status = 'C' AND (A.progress_state IS NULL OR A.progress_state != '완료') AND A.src_type IN ('DEV', 'IF', 'AP', 'FMS', 'SYSLOG', 'TRAP', 'ESM', 'SVR') UNION ALL SELECT A.*, '' AS user_dev_name, '' AS dev_name, '' AS dev_ip, 0 AS evt_level_tmp FROM cm_evt A WHERE A.status = 'C' AND (A.progress_state IS NULL OR A.progress_state != '완료') AND A.src_type NOT IN ('DEV', 'IF', 'AP', 'FMS', 'SYSLOG', 'TRAP', 'ESM', 'SVR', 'RACK') UNION ALL SELECT A.*, '' AS user_dev_name, rack_name AS dev_name, rack_ip AS dev_ip, CASE WHEN A.progress_state = '조치중' THEN -1 ELSE A.evt_level END AS evt_level_tmp FROM cm_evt A, ( SELECT * FROM s_cm_rack WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_grp_leaf WHERE grp_no IN (SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}) AND grp_type = 7 ) ) B WHERE A.status = 'C' AND A.src_mng_no = B.rack_no AND (A.progress_state IS NULL OR A.progress_state != '완료') AND A.src_type = 'RACK' ) S WHERE evt_level_tmp != -2 )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.seq_no, B.evt_name, B.eng_evt_name, CASE WHEN src_type = 'DEV' OR src_type = 'SYSLOG' OR src_type = 'ESM' OR src_type = 'RACK' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_dev10 T1 JOIN nt_cfg_group T2 ON T1.grp_no = T2.grp_no WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no) WHEN src_type = 'IF' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_dev10 T1 JOIN cm_dev20 T2 ON T1.mng_no = T2.mng_no JOIN nt_cfg_group T3 ON T1.grp_no = T3.grp_no WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND T2.if_idx = A.src_idx) WHEN src_type = 'SUB' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM nt_cfg_subnet T1 JOIN nt_cfg_group T2 ON T1.grp_no = T2.grp_no WHERE T1.sub_no = A.src_sub_no) WHEN src_type = 'SVR' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM cm_dev10 T1 JOIN nt_cfg_group T2 ON T1.grp_no = T2.grp_no WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND T1.dev_kind1 = 'SVR') WHEN src_type = 'AP' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM nt_cfg_group T1 JOIN cm_dev_ap T2 ON T1.grp_no = T2.grp_no WHERE T2.mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND COALESCE(A.src_mac, A.src_ip) = CASE WHEN A.src_mac IS NULL THEN T2.ap_ip ELSE T2.ap_mac END LIMIT 1) END AS grp_name, A.sum_sec, CASE A.progress_state WHEN '조치중' THEN '조치중' ELSE CASE A.evt_level WHEN 1 THEN '정보' WHEN 2 THEN '주의' WHEN 3 THEN '알람' WHEN 4 THEN '경보' WHEN 5 THEN '장애' END END AS err_level, CASE src_type WHEN 'ESM' THEN A.src_mng_no WHEN 'DEV' THEN A.src_mng_no WHEN 'IF' THEN A.src_mng_no WHEN 'GRP' THEN A.src_grp_no WHEN 'SUB' THEN A.src_sub_no WHEN 'SVR' THEN A.src_mng_no WHEN 'RACK' THEN A.src_mng_no END AS mng_no, CASE WHEN src_type = 'DEV' OR src_type = 'SYSLOG' OR src_type = 'ESM' OR src_type = 'RACK' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 T1 WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no) WHEN src_type = 'IF' THEN (SELECT if_ip FROM cm_dev10 T1 JOIN cm_dev20 T2 ON T1.mng_no = T2.mng_no WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND T2.if_idx = A.src_idx) WHEN src_type = 'SUB' THEN (SELECT ip FROM nt_cfg_subnet WHERE sub_no = A.src_sub_no) WHEN src_type = 'SVR' THEN (SELECT dev_ip FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND dev_kind1 = 'SVR') WHEN src_type = 'AP' THEN (SELECT COALESCE(ap_mac, ap_ip) FROM cm_dev_ap WHERE mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND COALESCE(A.src_mac, A.src_ip) = CASE WHEN A.src_mac IS NULL THEN ap_ip ELSE ap_mac END LIMIT 1) END AS dev_ip, A.maint_user, A.maint_tel, A.receipt_memo, COALESCE(NULLIF(progress_state, ''), '진행중') AS status, A.evt_cause, A.memo, CASE src_type WHEN 'DEV' THEN '장비' WHEN 'IF' THEN '회선' WHEN 'GRP' THEN '그룹' WHEN 'SUB' THEN '서브넷' WHEN 'SVR' THEN '서버' ELSE src_type END AS err_type, CASE WHEN src_type = 'DEV' OR src_type = 'SYSLOG' OR src_type = 'ESM' OR src_type = 'RACK' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(CASE WHEN user_dev_name IS NULL OR user_dev_name = '' THEN dev_name ELSE user_dev_name END, '[', dev_ip, ']') FROM cm_dev10 T1 WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no) WHEN src_type = 'IF' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(CASE WHEN T1.user_dev_name IS NULL OR T1.user_dev_name = '' THEN T1.dev_name ELSE T1.user_dev_name END, '[', T1.dev_ip, '] - ', CASE WHEN T2.user_if_name IS NULL OR T2.user_if_name = '' THEN T2.if_name ELSE T2.user_if_name END, CASE WHEN if_alias IS NULL OR if_alias = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT('[', if_alias, ']') END) FROM cm_dev10 T1 JOIN cm_dev20 T2 ON T1.mng_no = T2.mng_no WHERE T1.mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND T2.if_idx = A.src_idx) WHEN src_type = 'GRP' THEN (SELECT grp_name FROM nt_cfg_group WHERE grp_no = A.src_grp_no) WHEN src_type = 'SUB' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(sub_name, '[', ip, ']') FROM nt_cfg_subnet WHERE sub_no = A.src_sub_no) WHEN src_type = 'SVR' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(CASE WHEN user_dev_name IS NULL OR user_dev_name = '' THEN dev_name ELSE user_dev_name END, '[', dev_ip, ']') FROM cm_dev10 WHERE mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND dev_kind1 = 'SVR') WHEN src_type = 'AP' THEN (SELECT CONCAT(ap_name, '[', COALESCE(ap_mac, ap_ip), ']') FROM cm_dev_ap WHERE mng_no = A.src_mng_no AND COALESCE(A.src_mac, A.src_ip) = CASE WHEN A.src_mac IS NULL THEN ap_ip ELSE ap_mac END LIMIT 1) END AS err_target FROM A JOIN cm_evt_code B ON A.code = B.code JOIN cm_dev10 C ON A.src_mng_no = C.mng_no WHERE B.profile_no = 0 AND A.status = 'C' AND C.grp_no IN (SELECT sub_no FROM cm_topo_leaf WHERE grp_no = #{grpNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE cm_evt SET progress_state = #{progressState}, evt_cause = #{evtCause}, receipt_memo = #{receiptMemo}, memo = #{memo}, maint_user = #{maintUser}, maint_tel = #{maintTel}, receipt_user = #{userId}, receipt_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE seq_no = #{seqNo}

update.foreach: UPDATE cm_topo_link SET curve_x1 = #{item.curveX1}, curve_y1 = #{item.curveY1}, curve_x2 = #{item.curveX2}, curve_y2 = #{item.curveY2} WHERE link_no = #{item.linkNo} AND user_id =

mapper.select: SELECT refresh_time, show_label, line_color, polling_color, font_color, font_bg_color, alarm_chk, alarm_lv1_chk, alarm_lv2_chk, alarm_lv3_chk, alarm_lv4_chk, alarm_lv5_chk, alarm_lv1_path, alarm_lv2_path, alarm_lv3_path, alarm_lv4_path, alarm_lv5_path, json_conf, show_icmp_poll, show_ap_event, show_vm_event, digitclock_conf, slide_grp_conf, helpline_conf FROM cm_topo_user WHERE user_id =
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_topo_user WHERE user_id =

choose.when: INSERT INTO cm_topo_user ( user_id, refresh_time, show_label, line_color, polling_color, alarm_chk, alarm_lv1_chk, alarm_lv2_chk, alarm_lv3_chk, alarm_lv4_chk, alarm_lv5_chk, alarm_lv1_path, alarm_lv2_path, alarm_lv3_path, alarm_lv4_path, alarm_lv5_path, font_color, font_bg_color, json_conf, show_icmp_poll, show_ap_event, show_vm_event ) VALUES ( , #{refreshTime}, #{showLabel}, #{lineColor}, #{pollingColor}, #{alarmChk}, #{alarmLv1Chk}, #{alarmLv2Chk}, #{alarmLv3Chk}, #{alarmLv4Chk}, #{alarmLv5Chk}, #{alarmLv1Path}, #{alarmLv2Path}, #{alarmLv3Path}, #{alarmLv4Path}, #{alarmLv5Path}, #{fontColor}, #{fontBgColor}, #{jsonConf}, #{showIcmpPoll}, #{showApEvent}, #{showVmEvent} )
choose.otherwise: UPDATE cm_topo_user SET refresh_time = #{refreshTime}, show_label = #{showLabel}, line_color = #{lineColor}, polling_color = #{pollingColor}, alarm_chk = #{alarmChk}, alarm_lv1_chk = #{alarmLv1Chk}, alarm_lv2_chk = #{alarmLv2Chk}, alarm_lv3_chk = #{alarmLv3Chk}, alarm_lv4_chk = #{alarmLv4Chk}, alarm_lv5_chk = #{alarmLv5Chk}, alarm_lv1_path = #{alarmLv1Path}, alarm_lv2_path = #{alarmLv2Path}, alarm_lv3_path = #{alarmLv3Path}, alarm_lv4_path = #{alarmLv4Path}, alarm_lv5_path = #{alarmLv5Path}, font_color = #{fontColor}, font_bg_color = #{fontBgColor}, json_conf = #{jsonConf}, show_icmp_poll = #{showIcmpPoll}, show_ap_event = #{showApEvent}, show_vm_event = #{showVmEvent} WHERE user_id =

mapper.select: SELECT B.seq_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.model, B.img_file_nm, B.img_name FROM ( SELECT dev_kind1, dev_kind2, model FROM cm_dev10 GROUP BY dev_kind1, dev_kind2, model ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A1.*, B1.img_name FROM cm_topo_item_img A1 JOIN com_img B1 ON A1.img_file_nm = B1.img_uid WHERE B1.img_kind1 = 'MAP' AND B1.img_kind2 = 'IMG' ) B ON (A.dev_kind1 = B.dev_kind1 AND A.dev_kind2 = B.dev_kind2 AND A.model = B.model) ORDER BY A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.model

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item_img (dev_kind1, dev_kind2, model, img_file_nm) VALUES (#{item.devKind1}, #{item.devKind2}, #{item.model}, #{item.imgFileNm}) ON CONFLICT (dev_kind1, dev_kind2, model) DO UPDATE SET img_file_nm = EXCLUDED.img_file_nm

mapper.update: UPDATE cm_topo_item A SET usr_kind = B.img_file_nm FROM ( SELECT A1.mng_no, A1.dev_kind1, A1.dev_kind2, A1.model, B1.img_file_nm FROM cm_dev10 A1 JOIN cm_topo_item_img B1 ON A1.dev_kind1 = B1.dev_kind1 AND A1.dev_kind2 = B1.dev_kind2 AND A1.model = B1.model ) B WHERE A.dev_kind1 != 'GRP' AND A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND A.user_id =
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, slide_grp_conf FROM cm_topo_user WHERE user_id =
